candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr is 0%, the signal is structurally unvalidated and must be sized down or vetoed despite the conviction reading.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr < 0.40: size *= 0.0  # veto. elif consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and hist_hr >= 0.60: size *= 1.0  # full
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
